flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at American Public University System rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.4k → $8.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at American Public University System rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.4k → $8.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at American Public University System fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at American Public University System rose 34% between 2021 and 2024 (26.1% → 35.0%).
